ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the medical event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of medical event (e.g., 'hospital_stay', 'outpatient', 'mental_health') */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medical event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medical event */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_events_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  "cost" REAL /* Standard cost of the service */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category of the service (e.g., 'diagnostic', 'surgical', 'therapeutic') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance policy */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Maximum coverage limit of the policy */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "copay" REAL /* Copay amount for the policy */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed coverage information in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history details in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient submitting the claim */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical event related to the claim */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provided for the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., 'submitted', 'approved', 'rejected') */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for claim rejection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES medical_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., 'credit_card', 'check', 'online_transfer') */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'successful', 'pending') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., facility, physician, surgeon) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the provider (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider network */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider in the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (in-network or out-of-network) */,
  "network_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the network in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_networks_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, claims processor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
